summary: A new slice 'Withdrawal Decline Notified' has been added to the event model and partially scaffolded. The following items need to be implemented.

already_implemented.description: Event class WithdrawalDeclineNotified with all fields (account, amount, currency, declinedDate, payer, reason, session, source, transactionId)
Updated withdrawalDeclinedMessages to create a pg-boss queue message for NOTIFY_WITHDRAWAL_DECLINE_QUEUE plus an idempotency message
handleNotifyWithdrawalDecline command handler — appends WithdrawalDeclineNotified event via stream.appendEventWithdrawalDeclineNotified
Unit test for NotifyWithdrawalDecline slice (main flow)
createFundsWithdrawalDeclinedWorker — pg-boss worker listening on queue 'event.FundsWithdrawalDeclined.NotifyWithdrawalDecline'
New slice entry added to the index

still_missing.item: withdrawal declines read model projection slice
still_missing.description: The event model defines a 'withdrawal declines' read model (id: 3458764665346180017) that is fed by FundsWithdrawalDeclined events via a processor automation. A ProjectionConfig for 'WithdrawalDeclinesReadModel' (similar to accountBalanceReadModelSlice) needs to be created at src/BusinessCapabilities/Funds/slices/WithdrawalDeclinesReadModel/index.ts and registered in src/server.ts.

The commandHandler calls stream.appendEventWithdrawalDeclineNotified(...) which must exist on FundsStreamType. This is generated by the StreamFactoryBuilder when .withEventType(WithdrawalDeclineNotified) is called — verify this method is actually present on the built stream type (may be auto-generated by the framework).
still_missing.note: Likely auto-generated by framework from .withEventType(WithdrawalDeclineNotified) in the stream factory — verify it compiles.

key_observations: The slice is status='Review' in the index, meaning it has been reviewed but implementation may not be complete.
The pg-boss outbox pipeline (FundsWithdrawalDeclined → NotifyWithdrawalDecline command → WithdrawalDeclineNotified event) is fully scaffolded.
The 'withdrawal declines' read model described in the slice.json does not yet have a corresponding ProjectionConfig implementation in src/.
